steps.title: Read the graphed line
steps.content: The line shown is $y=f(x)+13$. Using points $(-3,8)$ and $(1,4)$, the slope is $-1$ and the equation is $y=-x+5$.

steps.title: Match to the form with positive $c,d$
steps.content: Rewrite as $f(x)=-8-1\cdot x=-d-cx$ with $d=8,\ c=1$ (both positive). That matches choice A — A is correct.
